name: Auto Cash Title Loans of Wi
description_short: Max Cash offers title loans in Chaska, MN and other locations, providing fast emergency cash using your vehicle as collateral with competitive rates and convenient terms.
description_long:
Max Cash® is a title loan lender operating across multiple states, including Minnesota, offering quick access to emergency cash for consumers who own vehicles. The company specializes in title loans—a form of secured lending where borrowers use their car title as collateral to obtain funds quickly. Based on the website content, Max Cash positions itself as a mission-driven lender focused on serving customers who need rapid access to capital.

The company offers three primary loan products: Car Title Loans for emergency cash, Car Finance Loans for vehicle purchases, and Car Refinance options to lower existing car payments. Their application process is streamlined and available online or via phone at (833) 207-9052. The platform collects information about the vehicle (year, make, model, mileage), borrower details, income, insurance status, and vehicle ownership status. Max Cash advertises competitive rates and convenient terms, though specific APR ranges are not disclosed on the Chaska landing page.

Max Cash distinguishes itself through digital accessibility features (screen-reader mode support), multi-channel application options (online form, phone, text), and instant pre-approval capabilities. The company also offers a newsletter signup promising exclusive offers. However, the website reveals that applications are processed through multiple partners—the terms disclose that Tradition Media Group LLC and up to six additional partners may contact applicants via email, SMS, or automated calls.

As a title loan lender, Max Cash serves an important but high-risk consumer segment. While title loans provide same-day or next-day funding for those with limited credit options, they carry significant risks: borrowers can lose their vehicle if unable to repay, APRs are typically very high (often 100%+ annually), and the debt structure can create cycles of repeat borrowing. The company's prominent disclosure of third-party marketing contacts and the involvement of multiple partners suggests a lead-generation model rather than direct lending in all cases.
pros: Online and phone application available with instant pre-approval option
Multi-channel contact support (phone, text, online form) for convenience
Advertises competitive rates for title loans in their category
Accessible website with screen-reader mode support for users with disabilities
Quick funding timeline typical of emergency title loan products
Flexible loan options beyond title loans (auto finance and refinance products)
Newsletter signup offering exclusive financial offers and updates
cons: Title loans carry very high APRs (typically 100%+ annually, though specific rates not disclosed)
Vehicle repossession risk if borrower cannot repay the loan
Applicant information will be shared with up to six third-party partners for marketing contact without direct control
Application disclosures indicate lead-generation model rather than direct lending relationship
No specific APR, loan amounts, or repayment terms disclosed on landing page
best_for: Vehicle owners with urgent cash needs and limited access to traditional credit
Borrowers facing emergency expenses who need same-day or next-day funding
Consumers with poor credit history who may not qualify for personal loans or credit cards
diagnosis: Max Cash is best for vehicle owners facing genuine financial emergencies who have exhausted other options and fully understand the high cost and repossession risk of title loans. The critical caveat is that title loans carry APRs typically exceeding 100% annually and create significant risk of vehicle loss; borrowers should explore payday alternatives, personal loans, or non-profit credit counseling before pursuing this option.
services: Car title loans for emergency cash
Car finance loans for vehicle purchases
Car refinance loans to lower existing payments
Vehicle valuation based on year, make, model, and mileage
Third-party lending network matching with up to six partners
Monthly newsletter with exclusive financial offers
Accessible web platform with screen-reader support
